rdf:Description.dc:description: SHM alert framework: GREEN/YELLOW/ORANGE/RED zones derived from the 1P resonance boundary (0.22 Hz for the 4.2 MW Gunsan turbine at 13.2 RPM). Zones span vertical scour strips; the power-law curve f/f0 = 1 - 0.167·(S/D)^1.47 passes through each zone's frequency shift interval. Secondary y-axis in Hz for operational readability.
